news.t: Innovator Expands Dual Directional ETF Lineup Following Market Demand

overview.description: The Innovator Equity Dual Directional 15 Buffer ETF - September (DDFS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims to make money in both positive and negative markets, on a limited basis, over a one-year period. The fund uses FLEX options based on the price return of the SPDR S&P 500 ETF. DDFS was launched on Aug 31, 2025 and is issued by Innovator.

data.title: Innovator Expands Dual Directional ETF Lineup Following Market Demand
data.text: WHEATON, Ill., Sept. 02, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Today, Innovator Capital Management, LLC (Innovator), the pioneer of Defined Outcome ETFs™, builds on its track record of category-defining innovation...
